activities_projects.title: List of Main Characters
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify the main characters in the story
Write one line about each character
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct listing with brief description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Introduction of Hari Singh
steps: Read the opening paragraph
Write 3–4 sentences describing Hari Singh

activities_projects.title: Character of Anil
steps: Read the sections describing Anil
Write three qualities of Anil

activities_projects.title: Setting of the Story
steps: Find clues about place and time in the story
Write 3 sentences describing the setting

activities_projects.title: Why Hari Singh Worked for Anil
activities_projects.objective: Understand the motive of the thief
steps: Read the interaction between Hari and Anil
Write reasons why Hari wanted to work for Anil

activities_projects.title: Teaching Moments in the Story
steps: Identify what Anil teaches Hari Singh
List any two learning moments

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
steps: Identify four major events
Write them in correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
steps: Pick five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings and use them in sentences

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
steps: Think about the ending of the story
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the lesson to real life
steps: Think about trust and honesty in real life
Write 3–4 sentences connecting it to the story
